billing.resolution_template: We have verified your billing concern. A refund of the overcharged amount will be processed within 3-5 business days to your original payment method.

refund.resolution_template: Your refund request has been accepted and will be credited within 5-7 business days. You will receive a confirmation email shortly.

technical.resolution_template: We have logged a high-priority technical ticket for your issue. Our engineering team will resolve this within 24 hours and notify you via email.

delivery.resolution_template: We have flagged your delivery concern with our logistics partner. You will receive an update within 24 hours with the revised delivery timeline.

account.resolution_template: We have initiated a secure account recovery process. A verification link has been sent to your registered email. Please check your inbox.

product_quality.resolution_template: We sincerely apologize for the quality issue. A replacement will be dispatched within 1-2 business days. A prepaid return label has been emailed to you.
